description: This file defines utility functions for splitting a string into tokens based on spaces, storing tokens in a linked list, and validating tokens. The file provides a singleton object SplitUtils with methods to perform the splitting, validation, and insertion logic.

methods.name: split
methods.description: Splits a string into tokens separated by spaces and returns a linked list of tokens.

methods.name: addIfValid
methods.description: Adds a token to the list if it is valid (non-empty).

methods.name: isTokenValid
methods.description: Checks if a token is valid, which currently means it is not empty.
